---
title: "{{< fa calendar >}} Schedule"
subtitle: "Spring 2026"
css: style.css
---

This page contains an outline of the topics, content, and assignments for the quarter. Note that this schedule will be updated as the quarter progresses, with all changes documented here.

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(googlesheets4)
library(gt)
library(tidyverse)
```

{{< fa book >}} **Prepare** – readings or tutorials completed before class

{{< fa users >}} **Activity** – activities done during class

{{< fa file-alt >}} **Project** – deliverables or milestones

```{r}
#| label: google-sheets-calendar
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

gs4_deauth()

d <- read_sheet("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1F-TQSmjGrp6yKmkR9WMAFzG7uoX7OZ3RiqOdNgV8kzo/edit?usp=sharing")
```

```{r}
#| label: format-calendar-entries
#| echo: false

t <- d |>
  mutate(
    week = ifelse(is.na(week), "", week), 
    week = recode_values(week, 
                         0 ~ "Week 0",
                         1 ~ "Week 1",
                         2 ~ "Week 2",
                         3 ~ "Week 3",
                         4 ~ "Week 4",
                         5 ~ "Week 5",
                         6 ~ "Week 6",
                         7 ~ "Week 7",
                         8 ~ "Week 8",
                         9 ~ "Week 9",
                         10 ~ "Week 10",
                         11 ~ "Finals Week"
                         ), 
  week_label = case_when(week == "Week 0" ~ week, 
                         week != lag(week) ~ week,
                         .default = ""), 
  date_label = as.character(date), 
  date_label = if_else(date_label != lag(date_label), date_label, ""), 
  date_label = ymd(date_label), 
  unit = recode_values(unit, 
                         0 ~ "Unit 0", 
                         1 ~ "Unit 1", 
                         2 ~ "Unit 2", 
                         3 ~ "Unit 3"
                         ), 
  unit = fct_relevel(unit,
                     "Unit 0", 
                     "Unit 1", 
                     "Unit 2",
                     "Unit 3"
                     )
  ) %>%
  select(unit, week_label, date_label, topic, prepare, activity, project) |> 
  gt() |>
  text_transform(cells_body(columns = c(prepare)),
                 fn = function(x){
                   ifelse(is.na(x), fontawesome::fa('book', fill_opacity = 0.1), 
                          glue::glue('<a href="{x}"><i class="fa fa-book" style="color: purple;"></i></a>'))
                 }) %>%
  # text_transform(cells_body(columns = c(slides)),
  #                fn = function(x){
  #                  ifelse(is.na(x), fontawesome::fa('laptop', fill_opacity = 0.1), 
  #                         glue::glue('<a href="{x}"><i class="fa fa-laptop" style="color: purple;"></i></a>'))
  #                }) %>%
  text_transform(cells_body(columns = c(activity)),
                 fn = function(x){
                   ifelse(is.na(x), fontawesome::fa('users', fill_opacity = 0.1),
                          glue::glue('<a href="{x}"><i class="fa fa-users" style="color: purple;"></i></a>'))
                  }) %>%
  # text_transform(cells_body(columns = c(lab)),
  #                fn = function(x){
  #                  ifelse(is.na(x), fontawesome::fa('pencil', fill_opacity = 0.1), 
  #                         glue::glue('<a href="{x}"><i class="fa fa-pencil" style="color: purple;"></i></a>'))
  #                }) %>%
  text_transform(cells_body(columns = c(project)),
                 fn = function(x){
                   ifelse(is.na(x), fontawesome::fa('file-alt', fill_opacity = 0.1), 
                          glue::glue('<a href="{x}"><i class="fa fa-file-alt" style="color: purple;"></i></a>'))
                 }) %>%
  fmt_date(date_label, date_style = 31) %>%
  sub_missing(columns = date_label, missing_text = "") |> 
  tab_row_group(
  label = gt::html('<a href="../1810-review.qmd">Unit 0 - Intro R Review</a>'),
  rows = (unit == "Unit 0"), 
  id = "Unit 0"
  ) |> 
  tab_row_group(
  label = gt::html('<a href="../unit-1.qmd">Unit 1 - Messy Data</a>'),
  rows = (unit == "Unit 1"), 
  id = "Unit 1"
  ) |> 
  tab_row_group(
  label = gt::html('<a href="../unit-2.qmd">Unit 2 - Professional Deliverables</a>'),
  rows = (unit == "Unit 2"), 
  id = "Unit 2"
  ) |> 
  tab_row_group(
  label = gt::html('<a href="../unit-3.qmd">Unit 3 - R Packages</a>'),
  rows = (unit == "Unit 3"), 
  id = "Unit 3"
  ) |> 
  cols_hide(unit) |> 
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "gray95"),
      cell_text(size = "x-large")
    ),
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = c("Unit 0",
                                            "Unit 1",
                                            "Unit 2",
                                            "Unit 3"
                                            )
                                 )
    ) |>
  row_group_order(groups = c("Unit 0",
                             "Unit 1",
                             "Unit 2",
                             "Unit 3")
                  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = topic)
    ) |> 
   tab_style(
     style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#E8EEF6")
      ),
    locations = cells_body(
      rows = str_detect(topic, pattern = "^Project [0-9]+ Due$")
    )
  ) |> 
  tab_options(
    row_group.padding = px(8)
  ) |> 
  cols_label(
    week_label = "",
    date_label = "",
    topic = "",
    prepare = md("**Prepare**"),
    activity = md("**Activity**"),
    project = md("**Project**")
    ) |> 
  as_raw_html() 
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: "asis"
#| label: output-calendar

cat(t)
```
